status: active region-based strong modded wilderness spawn pass
research_basis: In Control spawn.json can restrict existing spawns through rule conditions and deny results.
In Control spawner.json is the separate system for adding new spawns and should not be used until entity/biome targets are reviewed.
The latest player direction is that normal exploration should almost always have multiple visible mobs in sight, so the old settlement-safety caps are too conservative.
Jayden clarified that difficulty multipliers are fine, but they should be regional instead of time-based.
This pass raises cap ceilings, keeps global time/CRD scaling disabled, and adds Atlas region/ring pressure while keeping boss/dragon-tier namespaces from becoming routine starter-region spawns.
policy: Preserve installed mob content, remove time/CRD difficulty ramping, and make baseline wilderness danger high immediately. Extra difficulty should come from Atlas region/ring identity through the regional difficulty bridge. Open-sky daytime pressure should be daylight-safe and modded-first, while burning undead remain natural night/cave content rather than forced daylight filler.

active_hostile_injection.status: active modded daytime and cave hostile injection
active_hostile_injection.purpose: Replace the previous daylight zombie/skeleton fallback with explicit daylight-safe modded enemy pools. Caves still use biome-native monsters because sunlight burn is not a problem underground.
scope: Surface land modded hostile pressure during day and night.
safety: No open-sky forced zombies, skeletons, strays, or husks.
Surface rules avoid village structure tags.
Rules use maxhostile, maxlocal, and maxthis caps.

active_pressure_values.majrusz_time_or_crd_scaling: disabled; all CRD scaling flags false and CRD penalties zeroed

active_area_safety.hearthlands_boss_dragon_denies: Still active for Aquamirae, Bosses'Rise, Cataclysm, Block Factory bosses, IceAndFire, and Soulsweapons.
active_area_safety.sunreach_aquamirae: Still denied; Aquamirae remains water/coastal/frozen-ocean identity, not desert filler.

deferred.structure_tag_deny_rules: Deferred until verified in a copied world because bad structure-tag conditions can silently break intended spawns.
deferred.custom_spawner_rules: No longer fully deferred. Common hostile daytime/cave injection is active in config/incontrol/spawner.json; modded boss/elite injections remain deferred.
deferred.alexsmobs_individual_weight_boost: Deferred unless the world still feels empty during daytime/wildlife checks; blanket boosting every individual Alex's Mobs entry is harder to reason about.
deferred.rank_aware_dynamic_spawns: Still deferred. Current pass is flat strong baseline plus Atlas region/ring difficulty pressure, not rank/time scaling.
